description.en: The Lulu.com BMC as documented in Business Model Generation (pp. 70-71): self-publishing platform with print-on-demand, no manuscript filtering, niche authors and niche audiences, revenue from sales commissions and publishing service fees.
description.zh: 《商业模式新生代》第 70-71 页记录的 Lulu.com 商业模式画布:自助出版平台、按需印刷、不设稿件筛选、小众作者面对小众读者、收入来自销售抽佣与出版服务费。
